Home.title: Saint Jean de Nkom-Nkana Parish
Home.subtitle: A community of faith, hope and charity. Join us to celebrate the word of God.

Home.gallery_preview_description: Discover a few images of activities, meetings, visits and highlights from our community life.
Home.cta_title: Would you like to join us?
Home.cta_description: Whether you are new in the neighborhood or on a spiritual journey, our doors and hearts are always open to you.

Footer.description: A living community of faith, devoted to the service of God and neighbor in joy and charity.

GalleryPage.title: Photo gallery
GalleryPage.description: Explore a few moments from parish life: celebrations, meetings, activities, fraternity visits and community initiatives.

ContactPage.title: Parish contact
ContactPage.description: Find the parish administrative and pastoral services, practical information and useful contact points for your requests.
ContactPage.pastoral_note: The parish administration works with councils, ministry leaders and pastoral teams to ensure welcome, liturgical coordination, catechesis, charity outreach and the smooth life of the community.
ContactPage.address_value: Public School, Behind the Camp, Nkom-Nkana
ContactPage.contact_value: Please contact the parish office for appointments, intentions, certificates and administrative information.
ContactPage.visit_title: Would you like to meet us?
ContactPage.visit_description: You can visit the office, contact a ministry leader or check the parish location page to prepare your visit.

roles.parish_priest_description: Leads pastoral life, sacramental coordination and spiritual accompaniment for the community.
roles.secretariat_description: Welcomes parishioners, organizes practical information and handles ordinary administrative requests.
roles.pastoral_council_description: Reflects on parish mission priorities and supports the implementation of pastoral activities.
roles.economic_council_description: Supports material management, logistics and sound stewardship of parish resources.

AnnouncementsPage.title: Announcements & News
AnnouncementsPage.description: Find here all important information and updates from our parish community.

ChoirsPage.title: Our Holy Choirs
ChoirsPage.quote: "He who sings prays twice." - Saint Augustine

OrganizationsPage.title: Our Organizations
OrganizationsPage.description: Discover the groups and movements that animate the life of our parish. Everyone has a place in the Lord's vineyard.
OrganizationsPage.empty: No organization is listed at the moment.

ProgrammePage.title: Weekly Program
ProgrammePage.description: Plan your moments of reflection and community activities.
ProgrammePage.empty_day: No activities are officially scheduled for this day.
ProgrammePage.confessions_description: The priests are available for the sacrament of reconciliation or spiritual conversation before and after each Sunday mass, as well as by appointment during the week.

LocationPage.title: Find Us
LocationPage.description: Come visit us. Saint Jean de Nkom-Nkana Parish is located in the heart of the neighborhood, easily accessible by transport and on foot.
LocationPage.visitor_note: Free parking is available near the main entrance. Access is facilitated for people with reduced mobility through the south side gate.
